prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约14925→35344（异常断档）→21113→19153→22118，2022年出现大幅断档后逐步回升，2025年基准约22118名，近3年呈波动中后 移趋势；本省理科/物理类计划2021–2025年分别为63、63、64、65、65人，2026年大幅扩招至89人，较2025年增加约37%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力理论 上有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名2021年第74名→2026年第83名，近年排名略有下滑，整体处于中上211水平；2026年声誉评价偏 负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（校内通报质疑）；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），整体曝光度中等；2024年曾出现陕西文科投档线异常信号，但理科未见明显断档记录；风景园林学A+（全国顶尖），与该校农林特色高度契合，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；但A-及以上学科仅此1个，学科集中度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类 、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业热度持续高位，该校计算机类、电子信息等专业竞争激烈；本省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增加约19.7%，考生 规模大幅增长，竞争加剧；北京林业大学位于北京，对陕西考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在本省招生占比约0.9%（2025年50人/ 全国5575人），占比稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22118名、2026年计划大幅扩招37%以及本省物理类考生增加约19.7%三方面因素，扩招带来的位次下移效应（位 次数字增大）与考生增加带来的竞争加剧效应相互对冲，但扩招幅度大于考生增幅，预计最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约27068名，区间26568–27568名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 14925 → 35344 (abnormal gap) → 21113 → 19153 → 22118. A significant gap occurred in 2022, followed by a gradual recovery. The baseline for 2025 is around 22118, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend in recent years. The provincial enrollment plan for science/physics category was 63, 63, 64, 65, and 65 from 2021 to 2025, respectively. In 2026, it significantly expanded to 89, an increase of about 37% compared to 2025, which theoretically alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking dropped from 74th in 2021 to 83rd in 2026, indicating a slight decline in recent years, but it remains at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (internal notifications questioned). Its Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with moderate overall exposure. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the Shaanxi liberal arts admission line, but no obvious gap was recorded in science. Landscape Architecture is rated A+ (top nationally), highly aligned with the university's forestry characteristics, strongly attracting related majors. However, it has only one A- or above discipline, indicating high disciplinary concentration.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly sought after. Majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information at this university are highly competitive. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in the province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has some regional appeal for Shaanxi examinees. Its enrollment proportion in the province is about 0.9% (50 out of 5575 nationally in 2025), remaining stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 22118, the significant 37% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the approximately 19.7% increase in provincial physics category examinees, the downward effect on ranking (larger ranking number) from expansion and the intensified competition from increased examinees offset each other. However, the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate, so the minimum ranking is expected to drop significantly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 27068, with a range of 26568 to 27568.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 26568 to 27568, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 26000), focus on reaching for popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering. For rankings near the upper limit (above 27500), prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university's Landscape Architecture is an A+ flagship discipline. Although classified as Tier 2, its professional strength is extremely high and deserves special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2534 → 1996 → 13761 (abnormal gap) → 3589 → 2963. After a significant gap in 2023, it quickly recovered to 3589 in 2024 and further to 2963 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the past two years. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 10, 10, 10, 10, and 11 respectively, increasing to 14 in 2026, an increase of about 27% compared to 2025, indicating a relatively large expansion and easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a stable ranking range of 74–85 in recent years, belonging to the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents. Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with overall moderate attention. The 2024 reputation document mentions that Beijing Forestry University's liberal arts admission score in Shaanxi dropped sharply from 2000 in 2022 to 10000, but has significantly recovered in 2024–2025. Landscape Architecture is rated A+ (top in the country), although it is an engineering discipline, the university's overall agriculture and forestry characteristics have limited impact on liberal arts students' willingness to apply. Liberal arts majors mainly include Law, Business Administration, International Economics and Trade, Applied Psychology, and Business English.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is a socially recommended major and a popular direction for liberal arts. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 75,641 in 2025, indicating significant growth in the examinee pool and intensified competition. Beijing Forestry University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in the province remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2963, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 27%, and the increase in provincial history category examinees of about 17%, the expansion effect slightly outweighs the examinee increase effect, so the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly downward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3478, with a range of 2978–3978.
